name: Uber Technologies, Inc.
note: Down ~26% from its 52-week high but showing 14% YoY revenue growth in Q1 2026. Heavy AV investment could be a long-term catalyst. Trading near 52-week lows with analysts targeting 40% upside.

name: Atlassian Corporation
note: Crushed ~56% over the past year, but up 35% this month alone — the selloff may be bottoming. AI-powered dev tools (Jira, Confluence) position it well for enterprise spending recovery. Analysts see 78% upside.

name: Intuit Inc.
note: Trading more than 50% below its 52-week high. TurboTax + QuickBooks AI integration is a durable moat, and SMB financial software is sticky. Massive upside if the market re-rates this back toward prior levels.
